description: bstack governance hooks. Paths self-locate via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they survive reinstalls and are invisible to the skills CLI. The two hooks that WRITE <workspace>/.control (knowledge-wakeup via leverage-ship-sensor; leverage-sensor at Stop) run through bstack-hook-guard.sh, which no-ops them outside a bstack-governed workspace so this personal-scope plugin never pollutes non-bstack repos. arc-continuation + autonomous-posture are session-scoped, self-guarding, and write nothing to the workspace, so they run unwrapped (wrapping them would false-negative the loop-stall logic when cwd is a nested non-governed repo). l3-stability is source-guarded internally. bstack-autoupdate is workspace-agnostic (global). Primitive map: SessionStart = P6 knowledge-wakeup + P7 autoupdate; Stop = P19 arc-continuation + loop-sensor; UserPromptSubmit = P19 autonomous-posture; PreToolUse = L3-G0 gate.
